message:
test(uds): expand from 14 to 25 tests for Unix domain socket wrapper (wa-3e0r8)

Add 11 new tests: large data roundtrip (8KB), binary data with all 256 byte
values, EOF after writer drops, non-blocking read returns WouldBlock, listener
re-bind after cleanup, DerefMut for stream and listener, sequential connections,
into_raw_fd/from_raw_fd roundtrip, multiple messages over same connection,
simultaneous bidirectional exchange.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
